sessionTypes.name: Introduction Call (15 min)
sessionTypes.description: A short introductory call to find out a bit about you and what you're hoping to get from coaching. No preparation needed — just come as you are.

sessionTypes.name: Coaching Session (45 min)
sessionTypes.description: A focused 45-minute one-to-one coaching session. We'll work on the topics most important to you — whether that's career direction, leadership, confidence, or navigating a specific challenge.

sessionTypes.name: Coaching Session (60 min)
sessionTypes.description: A deeper 60-minute one-to-one coaching session, giving us more space to explore your goals and work through challenges together.
